gpt-4o-mini-tts.description: GPT-4o Mini TTS — compact speech synthesis model
gpt-4o-mini-tts.pricingTier: OpenAI API standard audio generation pricing
gpt-4o-mini-tts.pricingNotes: OpenAI GPT-4o Mini TTS estimates use published text-input and audio-output character rates. Custom voice consent/setup costs are handled separately when selected; free credits, batch/flex/priority prices, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
